name: galaxia3
description: Galaxia Obedy 3.0 - Stavový model pre plánovanie dodávok obedov

scripts.build: npm run install:subapps && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.render:build: NODE_ENV=production npm install --legacy-peer-deps && NODE_ENV=production npm run build
scripts.install:subapps: npm install --prefix backend --legacy-peer-deps --include=dev && npm install --prefix frontend --legacy-peer-deps --include=dev
scripts.typecheck: cd backend && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../frontend && npx tsc --noEmit

author: Galaxia Team
